description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a clean, boxy architectural form and a predominantly white exterior. The structure features a flat roof and large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A small landscaped area with a tree is visible adjacent to the building, adding a touch of greenery to the urban setting. The main entryway is slightly recessed and accessible via a short set of steps, with a simple, unadorned door and no prominent porch or columns. The house's facade is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and limited decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and contemporary style. The overall design suggests a focus on modern urban living, blending privacy with open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a minimalist facade. Features a small landscaped area and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entryway, large windows, and adjacent landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the boxy structure, window arrangement, and the edge of the entry steps.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the landscaped area on the right.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the flat roof, rear windows, and the tree near the building's corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a simple door, short steps, and no prominent porch or columns
